zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford於1409年出生在英國薩默塞特法爾 格福德時，他的父親Walter Hungerford31歲，母親Katherine Peverell26歲。他和Margaret Botreaux至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1459年5月18日在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年50歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里 馮 克洛斯 本 馮 卡農斯 本 馮 凱德拉爾 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford was born in 1409, in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, his father, Walter Hungerford, was 31 and his mother, Katherine Peverell, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Margaret Botreaux. He died on 18 May 1459, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford est né en 1409, à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Walter Hungerford, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Katherine Peverell, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Margaret Botreaux. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1459, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford 1409 in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Hungerford 31 und seine Mutter Katherine Peverell 26. Er hatte mit Margaret Botreaux mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Mai 1459 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford è nato il nel 1409 nel Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Walter Hungerford, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Peverell, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie con Margaret Botreaux. Morì il 18 maggio 1459, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerfordが1409年にイギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードで生まれた時，父Walter Hungerfordは31歳，母Katherine Peverellは26歳であった。彼はMargaret Botreauxとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1459年5月18日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで50歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー ス クロゼ オフ ス カノンス オフ ス カスエドラル チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford(이)가 1409년 영국 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Hungerford(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Peverell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Margaret Botreaux(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 5월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이 테 클로스 프 테 캔스 프 테 캐테드럴 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford nasceu em 1409, em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Hungerford, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Peverell, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas com Margaret Botreaux. Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1459, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford родился в 1409 г. в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Hungerford было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine Peverell, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Margaret Botreaux. Он умер 18 мая 1459 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности салисбури т клос оф т канонс оф т кэтедраль чурч, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford nació en 1409, en Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Hungerford, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Katherine Peverell, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas con Margaret Botreaux. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1459, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
